ASBESTOS LAW AND MOTION 220, DEFENDANTS FLUOR CORPORATION'S AND PLANT PRODUCTS & SUPPLY COMPANY'S MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ALTERNATE MOTIONS FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. ARGUMENT WAS HEARD IN BOTH CASES AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANT PLANT PRODUCTS & SUPPLY COMPANY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT AND ALTERNATE MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION AS TO THE TIMELINESS OF THE MOTION IS SUSTAINED. THE MOTION WAS SERVED ON PLAINTIFF LESS THAN 75 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING. THIS COURT LACKS THE AUTHORITY TO SHORTEN THE MINIMUM NOTICE PERIOD FOR HEARING A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN THE ABSENCE OF BOTH PARTIES' CONSENT. (URSHAN V. MUSICIANS' CREDIT UNION (2004) 120 CAL.APP.4TH 758, 763.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, REPORTER: MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR # 5208

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-11-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
John A. Burke, Esq. of BISHOP, BARRY & DRATH (510-596-0888), appearing for defendant / moving party Plant Products & Supply Company
Michael R. Robert, Esq. of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing for defendant/ moving party Flour Corporation in 274723 (McKines v. Asbestos)
James P. Nevin, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party / opposing party Matthew McKines

RULING:
Defendants Fluor Corporation's and Plant Products & Supply Company's motions for summary judgment and alternate motions for summary adjudication. Argument was heard in both cases and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Plant Products & Supply Company's motion for summary judgment and alternate motion for summary adjudication is denied. Plaintiff's objection as to the timeliness of the motion is sustained. The motion was served on plaintiff less than 75 days before the hearing. This court lacks the authority to shorten the minimum notice period for hearing a motion for summary judgment in the absence of both parties' consent. (Urshan v. Musicians' Credit Union (2004) 120 Cal.App.4th 758, 763.) Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer, CSR # 5208

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Feb-02-2010 Off Calendar

DEPT 206 ASBESTOS TRIAL SETTING CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-18-2009 Set For Trial On Mar-15-10 At 11:15 A.M. In Dept 206
